payload.answer: I found a relationship conflict for Sara: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Replace the existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Keep the existing memory unchanged: Sara is my daughter.
Keep both relationship facts separately, because both may be true or context-dependent.
Clarify with a more specific memory, such as: Sara is my daughter and also my niece by marriage/adoption/step-family context.
Do not save the new input.
